summary: Comprehensive testing of Traceability & Sustainability Module. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All features working - Dashboard stats, PO list with traceability indicators, Supply Chain Flow visualization, Alerts tab, Documents upload, Supplier Mapping, Materials tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Traceability score calculation correctly weights supply chain (50%), suppliers (20%), materials (15%), documents (15%)
Supply Chain Flow visualization shows 5 stages (Fiber→Yarn→Fabric→Garment→Dispatch) with green/gray completion status
Alerts are auto-generated based on missing data and expired certifications
Tier-wise supplier mapping (Tier 1/2/3) properly organized in UI
Document upload supports multiple certification types (GOTS, OEKO-TEX, GRS, etc.)
Role-based access working - both Brand and Manufacturer can access traceability data
seed_data_creation: Updated test PO (61bc85e4-8d3c-4d1f-a533-b7c5cfda5bee) with supply chain stages, tier suppliers, and material details via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Traceability module fully functional. Test PO ID: 61bc85e4-8d3c-4d1f-a533-b7c5cfda5bee has 3 completed supply chain stages (Fiber, Yarn, Fabric), 1 tier supplier, and material details. 4 active alerts exist for incomplete stages. All CRUD operations working. Supply chain visualization with clickable stages working.

traceability_overview.notes: GET /api/traceability/stats/overview returns avg scores and alert count

traceability_by_po.notes: GET /api/traceability/po/{po_id} returns full traceability record with 5 stages

create_traceability.notes: POST /api/traceability/po/{po_id} creates or returns existing record

update_supply_chain.notes: PUT /api/traceability/po/{po_id}/supply-chain updates stages and recalculates score

season_pos.notes: GET /api/traceability/season/{season_id}/pos returns POs with traceability status

traceability_dashboard.notes: Shows 4 stats cards (Avg Traceability Score, Compliance Score, Tracked POs, Active Alerts)

po_list_indicators.notes: PO cards show traceability status badges and scores

po_detail_page.notes: Shows PO info, scores, alerts banner, and 5 tabs

supply_chain_flow.notes: Visual flow with 5 stages, green=completed, gray=pending

stage_edit_dialog.notes: Click stage opens edit dialog with supplier, location, batch fields

materials_tab.notes: Shows material type, composition, GSM, sustainability tags

documents_tab.notes: Shows document list or empty state with upload button

upload_document_dialog.notes: Form with document type, title, dates, file upload

alerts_tab.notes: Shows active alerts with severity badges (high/medium/low)
